---
title: "Makeup changes the apparent size of facial features"
authors: "Jones, A. L., Porcheron, A., & Russell, R."
year: 2017
date: 2017-01-01
pub-journal: "Psychology of Aesthetics, Creativity, and the Arts"
doi: "10.1037/aca0000152"
pdf: "assets/papers/2017/Jones_etal_2017.pdf"
categories: [cosmetics, morphometrics]
---
